paper_title: Pollen Flow Monitoring in Transgenic Triticale

methods.description: Setup of field experiments to monitor pollen flow using transgenic winter triticale as a model plant.

steps.description: The field experiment was located in Radzików, central Poland in the years 2010 and 2011.
steps.searchable_summary: set up field experiment location and timeline

steps.description: The field experiment consisted of two experimental variants, each of 19,600 m².
steps.searchable_summary: define experimental variants and field size

methods.description: Monitoring of pollen flow using passive traps and analysis of pollen grains from transgenic triticale.

steps.description: Pollen flow of the transgenic line was monitored using 36 passive traps.
steps.searchable_summary: set up passive traps for pollen monitoring

steps.description: Slides were coated with an adhesive substance and set in eight geographical directions.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and position slides for pollen capture

steps.description: Collection of samples started on the day when the first anthers appeared on the main shoot spikes.
steps.searchable_summary: start sample collection at anthesis phase

steps.description: Slides were scanned using an Epson Perfection 4990 Photo scanner.
steps.searchable_summary: scan slides to capture pollen images

steps.description: The number of blue stained pollen grains was marked on the image of a slide using ImageJ software.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze pollen grain count using ImageJ

methods.description: Statistical procedures to analyze the collected pollen data and determine the relationship between pollen count and distance.

steps.description: Linearized nonlinear regression functions were carried out to approximate functions describing the number of pollen grains.
The transformed function was analyzed as a linear regression model.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze transformed function as linear regression

steps.description: The values of the model parameters were estimated using the least squares method.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate model parameters using least squares

steps.description: Inference about the significance of differences was conducted using one way ANOVA and Tukey's test.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct ANOVA and Tukey's test for significance
